goals.title: Risk: deleting the target's local OpenMLS handle on an untrusted fram...
goals.objective: Risk: deleting the target's local OpenMLS handle on an untrusted frame would cause denial of service. Mitigation: require carried commit bytes plus epoch and confirmation-tag preflight before removing local OpenMLS state.
